name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new gate rule, MCP tool, API endpoint, or governance capability

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## Problem or gap

<!-- What governance need is currently unmet? What can't you enforce or observe today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like. Be specific about the API surface, gate rule type, or MCP tool name if relevant -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds exist today? Why aren't they sufficient? -->

## Governance context

<!-- Which environments or agent deployment scenarios does this affect? (pilot / dev / prod, autonomous / supervised, etc.) -->

## Additional context

<!-- Relevant standards (AIUC-1, OWASP LLM, NIST RMF), integration points (MASS, LiteLLM, SPIRE), or examples -->

---

> **Agentic contributors welcome.** If you are an AI agent working on a PeaRL-governed project, you can open issues and submit PRs via the GitHub MCP tools. Ensure your task packet includes `github` in `allowed_actions` and that your project has cleared the pilot→dev gate before submitting code changes.
